description: HubSpot CMS template types, structures, and required variables

template_types.description: General website and landing page template. Most flexible type.
template_types.example_annotation:
<!--
  templateType: page
  isAvailableForNewContent: true
  label: My Page Template
-->

template_types.description: Displays a single full blog post
Combined template that handles both listing and post detail pages
Marketing email templates. Stringent CAN-SPAM requirements.
template_types.note: Cannot use widget_container or dnd_area. Uses email-specific variables.

template_types.description: Reusable template fragment included in other templates via {% include %}
Sitewide reusable component (headers, footers, sidebars). Editable once, reflects everywhere.

page_template_structure.example:
<!doctype html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <title>{{ page_meta.html_title }}</title>
  <meta name="description" content="{{ page_meta.meta_description }}">
  {{ standard_header_includes }}
</head>
<body class="{{ builtin_body_classes }}">

  {# Header global partial #}
  {% global_partial path="partials/header.html" %}

  <main>
    {# Drag and drop area #}
    {% dnd_area "main_content" label="Main content" %}
      {% dnd_section %}
        {% dnd_row %}
          {% dnd_column width=12 %}
            {% dnd_module path="@hubspot/rich_text" %}
          {% end_dnd_column %}
        {% end_dnd_row %}
      {% end_dnd_section %}
    {% end_dnd_area %}
  </main>

  {# Footer global partial #}
  {% global_partial path="partials/footer.html" %}

  {{ standard_footer_includes }}
</body>
</html>

auto_included.jquery: Optional. Configurable versions: 1.11.x, 1.7.1, or disabled via settings.
auto_included.layout_css: Auto-included in drag-and-drop templates; optional in coded templates that use dnd_area.
auto_included.tracking_code: Auto-included via standard_footer_includes. Excluded from email templates.
